assumptions: User progress data records exist in the system
Authentication is handled and user ID is available
Database schema can support time tracking fields
Existing Ask conversation history is available
Navigation and profile entry points can be modified
review_questions: Should we build on existing dashboard patterns in src/ui/web/ or create a new dashboard component?
How does this integrate with existing user progress data - are there existing collections/endpoints?
Should time tracking be implemented as a client-side heartbeat or server-side aggregation?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 18 (new dashboard with 6+ sections, multiple UI components). Risk: 13 (user data tracking, statistics, time spent). Novelty: 16 (new feature - no existing student stats dashboard). Cross-Domain: 10 (frontend UI + backend API + database + visibility API). Ambiguity: 4 (mostly clear, topic mastery formula pending). Dependencies: 9 (user progress data, auth, visibility API, Ask conversations). Total: 70

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains detailed ## Requirements with feature specs, entry points, controls, dashboard sections, metrics, design constraints, and ## Acceptance Criteria with 7 checkable items. Also includes technical implementation details in Context section.
